By 2014, we were on the edge. We had clients paying premium fees, but we were burning through consultants. Every {role} hire took 8+ months, cost 3x what we budgeted, and half the time they couldn't deliver the {cat_expertise} work we promised.

Our clients were leaving.

Then we realized: companies don't need hiring. They need {cat_result}.

So we asked ourselves: what if instead of finding a {role}, we just... embedded a fully-trained {cat_expertise} squad in 2 weeks?

{customers} said yes to this crazy idea. And it worked.

What was supposed to be a 6-month process became a 2-week ramp. Projects shipped faster. Teams learned faster. Everything changed.

The reason I'm telling you this: {company} is at that same crossroads right now.

You can keep hiring (and waiting 6 months), or you can do what the smart companies do.

Which path interests you?

Dori

devops.pain: your existing engineers are drowning in infra work they shouldn't be doing. Releases slow down. Tech debt piles up.
devops.result: cut deployment cycles from 2 weeks to 45 minutes
devops.offer: CI/CD pipelines, Kubernetes, Terraform, IaC  -  the whole stack

ai.pain: your team is stuck building ML infrastructure from scratch instead of shipping models. Training pipelines break. GPU costs spiral.
ai.result: cut model-to-production time from months to days with production-grade MLOps
ai.offer: ML pipelines, model serving, GPU optimization, and end-to-end MLOps
ai.audit: ML infrastructure and model deployment pipeline

agentic.pain: building reliable AI agents is harder than it looks  -  hallucinations, orchestration failures, and scaling issues slow everything down.
agentic.result: helped teams deploy production-grade AI agents with proper guardrails in under 4 weeks
agentic.offer: agent orchestration, LLM pipelines, RAG systems, and production guardrails
agentic.audit: AI agent architecture and LLM pipeline

finops.pain: cloud spend is growing faster than revenue. Nobody owns cost optimization, and engineers keep spinning up resources without visibility.
finops.result: helped teams cut cloud spend by 30-40% while maintaining performance
finops.offer: cloud cost optimization, FinOps frameworks, showback/chargeback models, and automated cost governance
finops.audit: cloud spending and cost optimization opportunities

cloud.pain: managing multi-cloud complexity without dedicated platform teams
cloud.result: reduced cloud provisioning time by 80% with self-service infrastructure
cloud.offer: AWS/Azure/GCP architecture, cloud migration, IaC, landing zones

security.result: shifted security left and reduced critical vulnerabilities by 90%
security.offer: DevSecOps pipelines, SAST/DAST, container security, compliance automation

data.pain: data pipelines breaking constantly and analysts waiting days for fresh data
data.result: built real-time data pipelines processing 10M+ events/day with 99.9% uptime
data.offer: data pipelines, ETL/ELT, data lakes, streaming architecture, dbt

platform.pain: developers spending 40% of time on infrastructure instead of features

platform.offer: internal developer platforms, golden paths, service catalogs, developer portals

sre.pain: firefighting production incidents instead of building reliability
sre.result: achieved 99.99% uptime and reduced MTTR from hours to minutes
sre.offer: SLO/SLI frameworks, incident management, chaos engineering, observability
